    "Prerequisite step not shown and no signoff page is attached for the confined space entry",
    "Sequence violation: entry or work in progress without documented pre-entry testing and permit signoff"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately and evacuate the confined space",
    "Verify atmospheric testing has been performed and documented",
    "Obtain and post the fully executed confined space entry permit at the entrance before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Entering or working in a permit-required confined space without verifying the prerequisite atmospheric testing and obtaining a signed permit is a critical safety violation under OSHA standards. Work must be halted immediately until compliance is documented.",
